sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Fleet Architecture & Competitive Positioning
required_elements: Fleet composition by ship type and size class with age distribution
Orderbook and future fleet expansion optionality
Competitive tier and market share position
Fleet utilization rates and idle/lay-up capacity monitoring

sections.title: Day Rates, Charter Economics & TCE Analysis
required_elements: Spot vs. period contract revenue mix and exposure
Time Charter Equivalent (TCE) calculation and Baltic index tracking
Freight rate indices and cyclicality assessment
Contract duration and revenue visibility from repricing

sections.title: Fleet Cycle & Scrapping Economics
required_elements: Weighted average fleet age and scrapping age profile
Newbuild price vs. scrap value spread analysis
Regulatory drivers for early scrapping (IMO EEXI, CII)
Dry dock schedule and maintenance cost inflation

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/TCE multiple benchmarking and market cycle positioning
Sustainable earnings power calculation under scenarios
NAV per share analysis and vessel valuation approach
FCF yield and capital return capacity (dividends, buybacks)

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Freight rate weakness and global trade demand signals
Fleet capacity oversupply and newbuild delivery pipeline risk
Debt maturity and refinancing risk in rising-rate environment
Regulatory compliance cost and geopolitical trade disruption

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: TCE cycle positioning and spot rate exposure earnings sensitivity
Fleet regulatory compliance timeline and cost burden analysis
Balance sheet resilience and capital return capacity under downturns
